title: POST-FIX TOST re-measure (HEAD 75b9b40: theta-limiter-removed 512a40e + alb-from-phb 75b9b40)
do_not_confuse_with: This is a NEW file. The frozen pre-fix aggregate proofs/m20/tost_run/tost_aggregate.json is UNCHANGED (md5 c12427318eacfd76672e29c22d1d40f6).
honesty_label: SINGLE-SEASON MAM (spring trade-wind) equivalence check, n=3 INDEPENDENT DAYS (05-09 case2_L2 24-72h block, 05-21 case3_L3 0-24h, 05-30 case4_0530_L3 0-24h). UNDERPOWERED for a full seasonal claim (ADR-029 floor n>=15, target n~=27). NEVER 'seasonal'. Same harness (_advance_chunk disable_guards=True, station-paired vs AEMET, complete-pair deletion, >=30-pair-per-block floor) as the frozen pre-fix run; swapped the purged 05-29 day for the fresh 05-30 day.
method: paired TOST on case-level RMSE deltas (RMSE_GPU - RMSE_CPU) vs AEMET station obs; frozen ADR-029 margins (10% of CPU-WRF-vs-AEMET RMSE benchmark); alpha=0.05 beta=0.20.
interpretation: Both fixes IMPROVED the station-paired T2 delta (prefix +0.863 -> postfix +0.734 K; 4.0x -> 3.4x over the +/-0.215 margin) and removed the +2.6 kPa pressure-Exner artifact (Ponly +2.0 -> -0.3 K on the d02/d03 corpus compare). But T2 is STILL OUTSIDE the frozen margin: the GPU still runs ~0.7 K worse than CPU-WRF against real AEMET stations, driven by the residual DAYTIME PBL theta-side over-flux (Task 5; land_day HFX +100..+184 W/m2, THonly peaks +0.9..+1.6 K at local-midday leads 12-15h). T2 fails by BIAS, not power -- backfilling n cannot fix it; closing the daytime MYNN/HFX over-flux (V0.2.0 Wave-1 P1-4a) is the precondition. U10 (+0.184) and V10 (+0.253) means are now WITHIN their margins by point estimate but TOST is NOT formally equivalent at n=3 (CI upper bound crosses margin -> underpowered). The honest NOT_EQUIVALENT_OR_UNDERPOWERED verdict is preserved, not amended.
